title: Resources for Small Businesses
text:
Advanced Technology Innovation (ATI) Broad Agency Announcement (BAA)
The Advanced Technology Innovation Broad Agency Announcement (ATI BAA) is open year round providing research opportunities with our directorate to any university, organization, or individual. These efforts identify and develop innovative concepts, stimulate technology innovation, and exploit breakthroughs in science to offer robust technology improvements to all elements of the Ballistic Missile Defense System.
The current announcement is listed below.
